seoTitle: Transfer Email Between Google Workspace Accounts
metaDescription: Migrating email between Google Workspace accounts? Compare Data Migration Tool, forwarding, and routing rules to move mail without losing data.
intro: Whether you're switching domains, consolidating teams, or restructuring your business, moving email between Google Workspace accounts requires choosing the right method for your situation. This guide compares three reliable options — the Data Migration Tool, email forwarding, and Gmail routing rules — so you can transfer mail without losing anything important. It's built for Workspace admins and users who need a seamless transition.

steps.heading: Use the Data Migration Tool for full inbox transfer
steps.body: This tool moves entire inboxes, sent mail, and folders from the old account to the new one, making it the most complete option when you need everything carried over.

steps.heading: Set up email forwarding for ongoing mail
steps.body: Email forwarding automatically sends incoming mail from the old account to the new one, which is useful for catching messages that arrive after the migration.

steps.heading: Configure Gmail routing rules for domain-wide moves
steps.body: Routing rules set up in the Google Admin Console handle domain-wide mail routing, which is especially useful when migrating multiple users at once.

steps.heading: Run pre-checks before migrating
steps.body: Review key settings and account details ahead of time to avoid mail delivery issues once the migration or forwarding setup goes live.

faq.question: Which method should I use to move email between Workspace accounts?
faq.answer: It depends on your needs — the Data Migration Tool moves full inbox history, forwarding handles ongoing mail, and routing rules work best for domain-wide changes.

faq.question: Will I lose old emails during the transfer?
faq.answer: Using the Data Migration Tool specifically transfers entire inboxes, sent mail, and folders, so following that method helps preserve your email history.

faq.question: Can I forward mail without moving everything at once?
faq.answer: Yes, setting up email forwarding lets incoming mail automatically flow from the old account to the new one without a full migration.

faq.question: Who can set up domain-wide routing rules?
faq.answer: This is done by a Google Workspace admin through the Google Admin Console, since routing rules apply at the domain level.

faq.question: What should I check before starting the migration?
faq.answer: Reviewing key account settings and pre-checks beforehand helps avoid mail delivery issues once the migration or forwarding is active.
